summary: That sounds really rewarding. I am an EMT and I love helping people, but I am also worried that I won't be able to help my patients as well as I want to. | Oh, that's tough. I have a friend who was diagnosed with diabetes a few years ago, and she's been struggling to find a way to manage her blood sugar levels while still being able to do the things she loves. | I love being able to share my thoughts and ideas with my audience.  It's also really rewarding to see people being inspired by my content.  I'm so glad we had this conversation!  It was really nice to meet you. | I'm not sure what my favorite color is because I love them all.  I think I might like blue the best, but I also love red and green.  I'm a sucker for all colors. | That's so interesting.  I know a lot of people who have a favorite color, but I've never met anyone who loves all colors.  That's really cool. | Thanks! I'm trying to stay positive and I know I'll be back to normal in no time. I also volunteer at the Red Cross on the weekends so I'm hoping to go back to that soon too. | That sounds like fun! I love learning new things too. I speak English and French fluently, but I've always wanted to learn another language. | That's awesome! I've always wanted to learn French. I'm not very good at languages, but I think it would be really cool to be able to speak multiple languages.

I've been busy adjusting to my new life in LA. I went to the beach to relax and spend time with my family. I'm also enjoying getting to know my new neighbors and exploring the city. | That sounds great. I'm going to Barbados next month and I'm really excited to explore new places. I've been reading a lot of used books about the island, and it sounds like it's a beautiful place. | My favorite thing about traveling is getting to see new places and meet new people. I love learning about different cultures and seeing how people live in different parts of the world. | Doing well, thanks for asking. I am a juggler, and I come from a small town in the Midwest. I start my day early, walk my dog, and then work on my tasks until late at night, listening to music about animals. What do you do for a living? | I love to sing country music. I went to the opera on vacation and got a new hair dye. I usually spend most of my time out with friends, so I don't get to see my family as much as I'd like. | I love to travel as well. I really enjoy exploring new places and trying new things. My favorite place to travel is probably the mountains. I love the peace and quiet, and the beautiful scenery. | That's so cool! I've always wanted to see the Grateful Dead live. I love going to parks with my family too. It's so nice to spend time with them. I have to say I'm a little jealous of your motorcycle! I've always wanted one but I don't have the time to ride it. | I like to go for walks around my new neighborhood after work. It's a great way to explore and make new friends. I'm also a big fan of music, and I love to listen to music to connect with my family and friends, even though we live far apart.

I've never read any of Stephen King's books, but I've heard good things about them. I'll have to check them out. I love historical fiction too. Have you read any of Ken Follett's books? | Hi! I'm looking forward to getting to know you better. I'm a software engineer, and I enjoy playing video games, reading books, and watching movies in my free time. What do you do for fun? | That sounds like a lot of fun! I love riding horses too. I do it as often as I can. I'm a huge fan of rock music as well. I love the energy it gives me. I'm also a writer. I've always loved writing and I'm working on my first novel. | I like to play football, watch movies, and spend time with my family and friends too. I'm also really passionate about the ocean, and I'm working hard to make a positive impact on it. | Oh no, I'm so sorry to hear that. I hope you find something new soon. My day is going well, thanks for asking. I'm a software engineer, and I'm just getting ready to start my day. | Those all sound like great activities! I enjoy spending time with my family and friends as well. I also like to play video games and watch movies. | That sounds like a lot of fun! I like to spend time with my friends and family, go to concerts, and read. I also enjoy watching documentaries and learning about new things. | Those all sound like fun activities! I love going out with my friends too, and I also like to play video games. I don't really watch sports, but I do enjoy going to the gym and working out.

That sounds like an amazing job! I love writing, but I don't have the patience to write long stories. I'm more of a short story writer. | Awesome! I'm happy to share. I recently moved because I wanted to be closer to my new love. I'm also really enjoying my new job as a math and science teacher. | Hi! I just graduated college with my bachelor s degree in education. I'm a teacher who cares about my students' success, I draw comics, and I like to dance with my friends. What about you? | I'm a small business owner trying to make my mark in the horse racing industry. I'm a married woman who is struggling in my women's studies class but is happy with my life. I spend time tending to my flower beds to keep my mind clear and at peace. I am proud of my mixed heritage and wouldn't want to be any other way. I'm also currently on a diet. | I make time for the things that are important to me. I love to play basketball, so I make sure to set aside time for that on the weekends. I also love to make clothes, so I'll usually spend a few hours each week working on a new project. | I'm not sure yet! I'm thinking about going back to school, but I'm not sure what I want to study.
I'm also looking forward to spending more time working on my comic book collection. | I love the feeling of being productive and getting things done.  Plus it's so satisfying to see a big tree fall down!  As an educator, I loved helping my students learn and grow.  It's so rewarding to see them succeed. | I love to juggle for a living in a circus, and I secretly want to be a professional athlete, but I know my parents would never approve. I have the gene that lets me know when someone has eaten asparagus. I am a leader in the french fry research department at del taco, and I start my day early, walk my dog, and then work on my tasks until late at night, listening to music about animals.

I love to go to the new restaurant that just opened up. It's got a really cool atmosphere and the food is amazing. I also love to go to the local diner. It's not fancy, but the food is delicious and the people are so friendly. | Sounds like you have a lot of fun hobbies! I love spending time with my friends and family, too. I also love to cook and work out. I'm not sure if I'll ever get into cosplay, but it sounds like a lot of fun. | I love volunteering! It's a great way to give back to the community and meet new people. I've volunteered at a local soup kitchen, a homeless shelter, and a tutoring center. It's always rewarding to help others in need. | That sounds like a lot of fun! I love to read books as well and I enjoy watching Jimmy Fallon.  I'm not very good at cooking, but I love to eat ethnic foods.  I'm also from Scandinavia, where my Viking ancestors are from. | That's so cool! I've always wanted to visit Scandinavia.  I love to cook and I'm always looking for new recipes to try.  I'm going to a chai tea festival this weekend with my friends.  Have you ever been to one? | It's definitely a learning process, but it's so rewarding to be able to cook healthy and delicious meals for your family. I'm sure you'll get the hang of it in no time! | That's great! I love going fast and listening to rock music while doing it. I used to drive my first bike a lot but haven't been on one for a long time. I don't like wearing boots and my favorite band is Tool. | I love cooking and reading! I'm also pretty creative, so I like to come up with new ideas for projects. I'm thinking of dying my hair turquoise soon, but I need to save up a little money first.

That's awesome! I'm glad you enjoy it. I've only volunteered once, but it was a really great experience. I helped out at a local animal shelter and got to interact with all sorts of cute animals. | My favorite part of my job is getting to meet new people and learn about their pets. I also love seeing the dogs' faces when they see how good they look after I've groomed them. | I love to dye my hair a bright shade of red, I love my mom and spicy food, my two dogs are the best friends a girl could have, and I enjoy watching the rain from the window and cuddling with my cats. | Hi! I'm a 35 year old male, single and not really close to my family. I have anger issues but I love my pet dogs and horseback riding. I live in a rural area and work on a farm. | I like to do the same! I love spending time with my friends and family, they are my biggest support system. I also love to volunteer at my local animal shelter, it's a great way to get hands-on experience with animals and learn more about veterinary medicine. | I am a vet tech, and I enjoy cooking for my beloved cat and dog. I am also a writer, and I am single, but my writing keeps me busy. I am looking forward to visiting Rome someday, but I cannot make myself go alone. What are your hobbies? | That's so exciting! I'm sure you'll do great. I'm a night owl and I love gummy bears. My relationships are the most valuable thing I own because they are a source of joy and support. I have several barn cats, they are a great source of entertainment when I'm not feeling productive. My morning routine begins with checking on my animals and tending to the crops. I hate cleaning! | That's really interesting! I'm glad you have a good support system. I love that you have barn cats! I wish I could have pets, but I travel too much. I'm a morning person and I love to start my day with a healthy breakfast of organic granola and fruit.

That sounds like a lot of fun. I like to spend time with my family too. I used to be a nurse but now I just stay at home and take care of my mom. | That's all really interesting.  I've never been a good writer, but I do enjoy building things.  I've never tried making a wedding cake, but I'm sure it's a lot of fun. | I work at the hospital as a nurse. I'm going to make my grandson a chocolate cake and brew a batch of beer. I spent my last birthday watching The Walking Dead and writing a short story about it. | That sounds like a busy day! I love chocolate cake. I also enjoy writing. I used to be a huge Superman fan as a child. I still like to listen to music from my childhood to make me feel younger. | I enjoy spending time with my family, especially on sunny days. We love to go for walks in the park, or just sit outside and talk. I also love horses. I used to ride horses when I was younger, but I have not been able to in a long time. | Sounds like you have a lot of fun hobbies! I love to read as well, and I love going for walks. I also enjoy spending time with my friends and family. | Hello! I'm a stay-at-home mom to my two daughters. I have a wonderful family and they are always supportive of my music store and my love for Harry Potter. I'm a powerlifter who loves the cold, but I'm not sure I could be a professional if I were blind. I also wait tables. The only autographs I have ever wanted are from authors. | That sounds like a lot of fun! I love the beach, too. I'm a lab technician, and I love my job. I also love children, so I occasionally go for walks down by the park. I'm looking for a quiet home with a view of the woods so that I can be close to nature and focus on my writing.

Hey there! Thanks for asking. I think the main thing that's been bothering me is that I feel like I'm not learning anything that I'm actually interested in. I'm really passionate about programming and I wish I could take more classes in that area. | That's awesome! I've always wanted to learn how to fly an airplane too. I love going on adventures as well! I recently went horseback riding for the first time and it was a blast! | I'm doing well! I'm a four year old girl with brown eyes and hair. I like to wear comfortable clothes that are easy to move in. I like to sing in my room when no one is around. I go surfing any chance I get. My favorite drink is caramel cappuccino. | That sounds like a lot of fun! I like to go for walks in the park, watch YouTube videos about welding, and make clothes. | Oh my, happy birthday! Mine was quite boring. I just hung out at the house all day. I am disappointed that I didn't win first place at the county fair with my blueberry pie. | That sounds fun! I'm a software engineer and I love to find the best tools for the job, even if they're not the most popular. I also don't have any social media presence because my time is focused on my music. | Hi, I am a 70 year old man. My biggest fear is not being able to perform my best on stage. My most valued possession is my health, because without it I cannot do the things that make me happy. I'm 5'10" but I feel like I'm taller than that because of my hair. | My day is going great! I just got back from hiking the Appalachian trail. It was a lot of fun, but I am really tired.

I keep my blue and hazel eyes open and take mental notes of the world around me. I'm afraid of not being able to beat my competitors in the marathon. I work as a barista during the week and I am in good shape and my weight is healthy. | I have to learn to adapt to a new way of life after my farm was foreclosed. But I just bought myself a new outfit to look nice and attract a potential partner. I'm happy and healthy at my current weight, although I'm a little clumsy. | Hi there! I'm so sorry to hear that you've had a history of anxiety and depression. I'm glad to hear that you're managing it well with therapy and medication. I have a younger sibling too, and I know how important it is to set a good example. | Hi! I'm a young woman who loves to ride my bike and spend time with my pets. I manage my bakery while trying to figure out my mental health. I enjoy capturing the beauty of Pittsburgh through my camera. I enjoy playing tennis with my mother, and it is a great way for us to stay fit. I enjoy playing with my cat Seven of Nine. What about you? | Hi, my mom would have been proud of me for talking my way out of a ticket. I enjoy cheeseburgers once in a while, but I make sure to get in my daily exercise to stay fit. I enjoy golfing. I'm a Game of Thrones fan who worries about my mom's health. I'm on a keto diet. | Thank you for sharing your experience. I know it's not easy. I'm glad you were able to find help and support. I'm looking for ways to cope with the stress and uncertainty of the situation. | I eat a balanced diet and exercise regularly. I also love to go for walks in the park. It's a great way to get some fresh air and clear your head. | That sounds like a lot of work! I'm sorry to hear that you've been struggling with your mental health recently. I hope things get better for you.
